name: FLUX (Black Forest Labs)
pricing_notes: FLUX.1-dev/schnell: open weights (non-commercial); FLUX.1-pro: API via BFL ($0.055/image); via fal.ai/replicate

auth.notes: BFL API key for hosted inference; open weights for self-hosted

performance.notes: API: 3-10s per image; self-hosted on A100: 5-20s; schnell variant faster (~1-3s)

agent_readiness.notes: State-of-the-art image generation models (FLUX.1-dev, FLUX.1-schnell, FLUX.1-pro). Significantly better than Stable Diffusion XL for photorealism and text rendering. Rectified Flow architecture. Open weights available for dev/schnell (non-commercial). Pro API for commercial use. Accessible via HuggingFace diffusers, fal.ai, Replicate, BFL API. The current open-source SOTA for image generation.

gotchas: FLUX.1-dev/schnell non-commercial license — commercial apps require Pro API
Very high VRAM requirements for self-hosted (24GB+ for full quality)
Pro API pricing adds up quickly at scale
Limited fine-tuning ecosystem compared to Stable Diffusion
best_when: State-of-the-art open-weight image generation (photorealism, text rendering)
Agent pipelines generating images via API (fal.ai/Replicate/BFL)
When SDXL quality is insufficient for the use case
avoid_when: When self-hosted SD with fine-tuned models suffices
CPU-only or low-VRAM environments for self-hosted
summary: FLUX is Black Forest Labs' state-of-the-art image generation model family. Significantly better than SDXL for photorealism and text rendering. Open weights for dev/schnell (non-commercial). Pro API for commercial use via BFL, fal.ai, or Replicate. Current open-source SOTA for image generation. Best for agents and applications requiring high-quality image generation.
